query:
SELECT 
  c.externalId,
  c.name,
  c.accountNumber,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.dataSource
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.accountNumber IN ('96792', '94178', '94983', '93599', '96149', '94152')
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
ORDER BY c.accountNumber;
